channel.title: Dependency Risk Digest
channel.description: Frontend npm dependency-risk updates with OSV/CVE signals, release notes, breaking changes, security updates, and recommended actions.

item.title: Week 29, 2026 Frontend Dependency Risk Digest
item.description: 20 risky updates, 1 breaking changes, 0 security-relevant releases, OSV/CVE checks, release notes, and recommended actions.

item.title: Week 29, 2026 dependency-risk archive
item.description: Jul 6 - Jul 12: 20 risky updates, 1 breaking changes, 0 security-relevant releases, and 82 tracked frontend npm packages.

item.description: Jun 1 - Jun 7: 37 risky updates, 15 breaking changes, 4 security-relevant releases, and 82 tracked frontend npm packages.

item.title: typescript 7.0.2 major version update
item.description: Major version release detected. OSV: No OSV match. CVE: No CVE match. Recommended action: Review changes before updating. Test in staging before merging.

item.description: Minor version release detected with no OSV match. OSV: No OSV match. CVE: No CVE match. Recommended action: Review if used. Batch with normal dependency maintenance. GitHub release notes were found for review.
